events.title: Celebration of World Environment Day
events.description: S B Patil college of Science & Commerce, Ravet celebrated World Environment Day with enthusiasm and purpose. The program aimed to spread awareness about plastic pollution and encourage sustainable habits among students and staff.

events.title: Celebration of Vasundhara Diwas
events.description:
Vasundhara Diwas  highlights the need to protect the planet from pollution and climate change, encouraging actions like tree planting, cleaning, and adopting eco-friendly habits.
SBPCSC Celebrated this day by cleaning the Pawana  river side  area along with PCMC team.
Students joined hands with PCMC members and cleaned the riverside area.

events.title: Pariksha Pe Charcha
events.description:
At Pariksha Pe Charcha, PM Modi engaged in a lively chat with students at New Delhi. From tackling exam stress to mastering time, PM Modi shared wisdom on leadership, wellness, and chasing dreams. He praised the youth for their concern about climate change, urging them to take action. Emphasizing resilience, mindfulness, and positivity, he encouraged students to shape a brighter future.
SBPCSC students of class 12th got engross in listening our Hon. Prime Minister.

events.title: Celebration of 77th Republic Day
events.description:
Our college celebrated India’s 76th Republic Day with enthusiasm and grandeur. The event showcased the spirit of unity and patriotism among the students and staff.
The programme commenced at 8:00 a.m. with the arrival of the Management members, Principal, and the Chief Guest, who were welcomed with a slow march past. The Chief Guest, Rtd.Colnel Kailash Sanap was escorted to the flag-hoisting ceremony by the students of PCCOER.Following the ceremonial hoisting of the National Flag by the Chief Guest, the students saluted the flag and pledged to uphold the honour and integrity of the country.

events.title: Visit to S.B.Patil College of Architecture and Design,Akurdi.
events.description: Successful visit by 135 S. B. Patil Junior College students to SBPCOAD! Students gained valuable insights into the field of architecture, NATA exam preparation, and the admission process. The visit also included an informative tour of the college, guided by SBPCOAD faculty.

events.title: FunFair 2025
events.description:
On 29 November 2025, S.B. Patil College of Science and Commerce,
								Ravet, organized a vibrant Fun Fair 2025 exclusively for 11th standard
								Science and Commerce students, fostering creativity, teamwork, and
								enjoyment. The event featured an array of student-managed food stalls
								offering delicious varieties like snacks and beverages, drawing
								enthusiastic participation and positive feedback on taste and
								presentation.Amar Shelke sir served as the incharge, ensuring seamless
								coordination.
Shital Shende ma’am and Sandhya Mhaske ma’am provided
								vital support for smooth operations, handling arrangements and student
								involvement effectively.Principal S.N. Patil Sir and Senior College
								Principal Mrs. Smriti Pathak Ma’am inaugurated the event, motivating
								students and highlighting the importance of such extracurricular
								activities in holistic development.The Fun Fair exemplified the
								college's commitment to balancing Academics with fun, similar to past
								events like the August 2025 celebration, promoting student skills and
								community spirit.

events.title: SBPCSC visits PCU
events.description:
On 26 November 2025, S.B. Patil Junior College, Ravet, visited PCET’S Pimpri Chinchwad University (PCU) Sate,Pune. to provide 12th standard Science and Commerce students with detailed information and guidance about the courses offered at the university. The visit aimed to familiarize students with the university's academic programs and help them make informed decisions about their higher education.
The university presented a wide range of courses across various disciplines including Engineering, Management, Science, Design,Commerce, and Pharmacy. Science students were introduced to programs such as B.Tech in Computer Science (with specializations like Artificial Intelligence), B.Sc in fields like Clinical Psychology,Nutrition and Dietetics, and Computer Science with Cyber Security.Commerce students learned about management courses like BBA and MBA,as well as commerce-related degrees.
The session also covered course duration, admission criteria including entrance exams accepted, and career prospects associated with each program. The university emphasized interdisciplinary opportunities and industry-aligned curriculum to prepare students for future challenges and job markets.This interaction was intended to motivate and guide students towards suitable academic and professional pathways after their 12th standard completion.
The visit succeeded due to efforts by Pradeep Kasar Sir, Amar Shelke Sir, Anjali Rane Ma’am, Shailaja Pande Ma’am, Sujata Selam Ma’am,Kanchan Landage Ma’am, and Nikhil Sir, who coordinated logistics,student supervision, and engagement for a smooth experience.

events.title: Poster Making Competition
events.description:
S.B. Patil College of Science and Commerce organized a Poster Making Competition on 19th November 2025 for the students of Standard XI. The event was conducted by the Department of English with the aim of encouraging creativity and expressing ideas through visual art and language.
The competition was inaugurated by the Principal, Mr. S. N. Patil Sir, who highlighted the importance of such activities in enhancing students’ imagination and communication skills. The event was supervised under the guidance of the Head of Department, Mr. Sharan Ausekar Sir, and Program Incharge, Mrs.Gautami Das .The participants enthusiastically displayed their artistic talents through thought-provoking and beautifully designed posters. The event concluded with words of appreciation from the judges, who praised the students for their innovative ideas and artistic expression. Overall, the competition was a great success and provided a valuable platform for students to showcase their creativity."

events.title: Ganpati Idol Making Competition
events.description:
S.B. Patil Junior College organized a Ganpati Idol-Making Competition
								on 26th August 2025 in the college basement to encourage creativity,
								eco-friendliness, and cultural enthusiasm among students. The event
								aimed to promote the importance of environmentally safe celebrations
								during the Ganesh festival.
A total of 21 groups, comprising 52 students, enthusiastically
								participated in the competition. The participants showcased their
								talent and devotion by crafting beautiful and innovative Ganpati idols
								using eco-friendly materials like clay, paper, and natural colors. The
								atmosphere was filled with energy, creativity, and festive vibes as
								students displayed their artistic skills. The event was efficiently
								organized under the guidance of Mrs. Vinita Chandratre and Mrs. Rita
								Gadewar, who ensured smooth coordination throughout.  The event
								concluded on a positive note, leaving behind an inspiring message of
								celebrating festivals responsibly and sustainably. After a tough
								evaluation, the winners were declared:
1st Prize: Lokesh Nagraj Gajula, Shravankumar Narayanlal Medtiya, Dnyaneshwari 
								 2nd Prize: Krushna Kumawat, Ahad Shaikh, Darsh Palekar 
								 3rd Prize: Bhuvika Pawar, Janhvi Gaware, Khushbu Kumawat

events.title: Rakhi Celebration with Masti ki Pathshala
events.description: On the occasion of Raksha Bandhan, Under the guidance of Mrs.Kalyani Bhondave & Mr.Pradeep Kasar students of SBPCSC of 12th class Science & Commerce   visited the Masti ki Pathshala an NGO for roadside kids., to celebrate the festival with children on 14.08.2025.SBPCSC students tied Rakhis to children and shared the festive happiness with them.As a token of love, they gifted each child bisuits  and chocolates. They also contributed Groceries, and Food packets for their daily needs.The day was filled with joy, laughter and spirit of togetherness.The Children's smile and excitement made the celebration truly memorable.SBPCSC students also celebrated Rakhi festival Old Age Center Members.

events.title: Induction Program AY 2025-26
events.description:
Transition from school  to college life is one of the most challenging events in a student’s life. When new students enter an institution, they come with diverse thoughts, and backgrounds. An important task, therefore, is to welcome new students and prepare them for their new role. Student Induction is designed to help in the whole process.
								S.B.Patil College of Science & Commerce ,Ravet Bengaluru organized a Student Induction Program for 11th class students of Science & Commerce on 11th August 2025,Monday. The Chief Guest on the Inaugural day was Prof.Vivek Velankar renowned writer and Counsellor, founder & owner ARV Infotech, Pune.,Prof.Pradeep Kadam ,Motivational Speaker,Dr.Rajendra More,Psychological Counselling

events.title: Celebration of Independence Day
events.description: This year, SBPCSC, celebrated the 79th Independence Day of our great nation with immense patriotism and pride. The day honored the countless heroes who sacrificed for India’s freedom and called on the youth to uphold the values that make Bharat truly great.Cheif Guest Mr.Upendra Dhone whose inspiring words emphasized selfless service and true patriotism .The celebrations began with the ceremonial hoisting of the national flag and followed by  the national anthem. Students  performed captivating patriotic songs, skits, and dances.The program beautifully reflected India’s journey—from struggle to strength.

events.title: Dental Checkup Camp
events.description: Dental Check-up Camp was held in SBPCSC on  22nd July 2025 for class12th students of Science and Commerce.Panel of Doctos conducted this camp was  Dr. Suraj Tidake and his team of  6 other doctors.As part of the check-up, tooth X-rays were also taken.The aim in conducting dental checkups was to  promote their dental health and awareness.

events.title: Fun Fair Celebration at S.B. Patil College of Science and Commerce on 24th June 2025
events.description: S.B. Patil College of Science and Commerce organized a vibrant FunFair following a lively Retro Theme that brought a wave of nostalgia and excitement across the campus. The event was inaugurated by the esteemed Principal, Mr. Sandip Patil, who encouraged the students to participate wholeheartedly and make the event a grand success. The students enthusiastically set up a variety of food and game stalls, offering delicious treats and engaging activities for all. From traditional snacks to modern delights, and from fun-filled games to retro-themed decorations, the fair had something for everyone. Both students and teachers actively participated and thoroughly enjoyed the joyful atmosphere. The entire campus was filled with laughter, music, and vibrant colours, perfectly capturing the essence of the retro theme.

events.title: Extempore Competition
events.description: On 25th June 2025, an Extempore Competition was held at S.B. Patil College of Science and Commerce, Ravet to improve students'spontaneity, confidence, and public speaking skills. Participants were asked to pick a topic and speak on it for 2-3 minutes. The judging panel, consisting of Mr. Amar Shelke and Mrs. Gautami Das, evaluated the participants based on content relevance, confidence, language fluency, originality, creativity, and overall impact. The winners were Aron G., Dhairya Patil, and Afna Mohammadali. The event was a valuable platform for students to showcase their potential. Mr. Ausekar sir also assisted to bring a grand success of this event.

events.title: Celebration of International Yoga Day
events.description:
On 23rd June, 2025, SBPCSC organised and celebrated International Yoga Day.Students from  Grade 12th of Science & Commerce , along with  teaching and non-teaching faculty, participated  in a celebration of health and harmony.
They all performed a series of yoga postures dedicated to the sun,symbolising vitality and renewal along with Surya Namaskars and the basic Pranayama for relaxation.Happy International Yoga Day !Yoga Instructor

College conducted Flower and Grain Rangoli Making Competition for 12th Commerce and Science. Students showcased their creativity in this competition

Session included various Breathing Exercise such as Pranayam ,Alom Vilom and Swar Vidnyan.

events.title: Celebration of Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Jayanti
events.description: Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Jayanti celebrated on April 11th2025  under the guidance of Mrs Anjali Rane . Program began with Saraswati Puja and garlanding photos of Saraswati and Mahatma Jyotiba Phule followed by speeches delivered by two students, Aditi and Tanishka and then Principal Sir. At the end of the  program ,our student named Aditi presented vote  of thanks.

events.title: National Science Day - poster making competition
events.description: The National science day was celebrated on 3rd March 2025 Monday  with full energy & enthusiasm. The program included speeches delivered by students,teachers & Principal sir Mr. S.N. Patil.  On the same day students had given an opportunity to showcase their imagination, creativity & thinking through poster making competition. The topics for poster making competition were Artificial Intelligence, New ways of Energy Generation, Nanoscience & Chandrayan. To encourage students, prizes were also given to all participants (students).

events.title: Celebration on Sant Gadge Baba Jayanti
events.description:
The Birth anniversary of Sant Gadge Maharaj originally observed on February 23rd, was commemorated with zeal and enthusiasm at S.B. Patil Junior College on February 24th,2025. The event drew participation from both students and teachers of the Science and Commerce streams.
In this program, the video on Sant Gadage Maharaj's life was played and by watching that video everyone was inspired. Students from 11th science A and B gave speeches on Sant Gadge maharaj and highlighted his work and efforts that he put for the society.
Respected Principal Sir also delivered a speech on Sant Gadage Maharaj in which he emphasized on his qualities that he possessed.

events.title: Pariksha Pe Charcha Live Session
events.description: Pariksha Pe Charcha is part of the larger movement - ‘Exam Warriors’ - led by Prime Minister Narendra Modi, to create a stress-free atmosphere for youngsters. SBPCSC students of class 11th  got engross in listening our Hon.Prime Minister.

events.title: Annual Gathering "UTSAV"
events.description:
S B Patil College of Science and Commerce recently hosted its culture Annual Gathering Program at SBPCOAD Auditorium  Pune. On 28th December 2024, The event was a spectacular showcase of talent, creativity, and enthusiasm, as students took to the stage to dazzle the audience with their acting performances.
								The event was attended by esteemed guests, including Dr. Sachin Jain, Dr. Rajendra More ,Abhishek Mehta sir, Ajinkya Dabhade sir and Dr. Harish Tiwari , Principal of PCCOER
The program also recognized and rewarded academic excellence, with prizes distributed to top performers. Winners of zonal level sports competitions were awarded certificates and trophies, while participants in the poster making and dandiya (garba) competitions received certificates and cash prizes.
								The program, themed "Utsav" (Festival), was a celebration of cultural diversity, academic excellence, and sportsmanship. Students from the college participated in various cultural events, including dance, drama, and music, showcasing their exceptional talent and skit
The program commenced with a traditional lamp lighting ceremony, followed by a Classical Saraswati Vandana dance. The audience was then treated to a series of captivating cultural performances, including skits on Ganpati and Janmashtami, Koli dance, and acts on Mahishasur Vadh and Ramayan.
								The Annual Gathering Program "Utsav" ended with a heartfelt Vote of Thanks, wrapping up an unforgettable evening of joy, laughter, and celebration.

events.title: The S.B.Patil College of Science & Commerce, Ravet organized the Science Exhibition named "BRAINWAVES"for classes IX to XI on 21st December 2024,Saturday.The BRAINWAVES considered three different events SCIENCE PROJECT Exhibition,Quiz Competition,Web Weavers.
events.description:
The exhibition witnessed great enthusiasm and blooming participation from children of diverse classes, who had the unique opportunity of exploring as well as expressing their creative scientific ideas in the form of activities, models and projects. The students displayed their creative scientific potential in diverse arenas revolving around the themes of contemporary significance, namely, Agriculture and food security, Sources of energy and their conservation, Transport and communication, Disaster Management, Health, Robotics and engineering sciences.
 Chief Guest for the program was   

								1. Dr.Jaywant Ingale Ex.Group Directors,ISRO  ,

								2.Dr.Dinesh Amalnerkar -Advisor -Research & International Academics,PCCOE

events.description:
The purpose of the visit was to provide the students with an immersive experience of University, expose them to various Academic Disciplines, and inspire their educational aspirations.

events.title: Certification
events.description: SB Patil College of Science and Commerce Girls Shine at Inter-College Competition!  We are thrilled to announce that our talented students have secured            the *FIRST PRIZE* at the Inter-College Competition held at Indira College of Art, Commerce, and Science, Pune. Our students showcased exceptional skills and teamwork, earning them the prestigious trophy and a cash prize of ₹10,000.     Hearty congratulations to our winning team! We are proud of our students' outstanding achievement!    Best wishes for their future endeavors!

events.title: Visit to SBPCOD Nigdi
events.description: SBPCSC organised a visit to PCET 's SBPCAD Nigdi.Archtiecture College Principal Dr.M.Sonawane guided students on how to apply for Architecture admission and Careers opportunities after Architecture.

events.title: Lokmanya Tilak Jayanti
events.description: "SBPCSC celebrated "Lokmanya Tilak Jayanti" on 23rd July 2022 with great enthusiasm, Principal Sandip Patil Sir and other staff was present on this occasion, student took active participation by delivering speech, story and poem."

events.title: Guru Purnima Celebration
events.description:
SBPCSC celebreated Guru Purnima with Saraswati Pujan and Vyas Pujan followed by Guruvandana. 
								Students paid gratitude and respect through dance, song, quotation, poem, speech etc. Mrs. Arpana Jagdale, Pre-Primary Teacher, SBPPS and Mrs. Shubhangi Kulkarni, Coordinator SBPPS Ravet. 
								All teaching and non teaching took great efforts to make this program successful.

events.title: Life's Green Class
events.description:
"Mobile Science Lab visited S.B.Patil College on 14th and 15th June 2022. 12th class Science and Commerce students learned various concept of Science practically and dramatically.
University of Pune, and LG Electronics and Hanyang University, South Korea (Seoul) have jointly launched this Mobile Science Lab to create the scientific interest amongst the young school students in India (UGC approved programme at SPPU, PUNE). Mobile Science Lab is an innovative initiative in the field of science, for hands-on activities of different modules and facilitates easy learning of concepts by students."

events.title: Science Day Celebration
events.description: 28/02/2022 Tuesday SBPCSC celebrated National Science Day. Science day celebrations started with the inaugural session on 28th Feb 2020 with the lighting of the lamp and paying homage to Sir C.V.Raman. Students had arranged VidnyanDindi (Science Procession), Quiz Competition. Student performed Cultural Activities. Shri Ashok Khutwad, Scientific Assistant-India Meteorology Department, Pune gave a special talk on 'Amazing Antarctica’. Dr.Jhanavi Inamdar, PCET-Academic Co-ordinator was the Chief Guest and PTA member Shri. Manoj Jadhekar also attended the program .

events.title: "Mr.
events.description:
"Mr. Rahul Badgujar, student of PCCOE, studying in B.E IT has been successfully selected by Data Insights for role of Software Developer.
Package Offered: 36 Lakh per Annum.
He was invited by SBPCSC team to motivate students for career guidance, and give latest live experience of B.E students.....
It was a joyful moment for 11th competitive students."

events.title: English Department conducted Elocution Competition for Class 11 students on 22/03/2022 Tuesday in SBPPS auditorium.
events.description: English Department conducted Elocution Competition for Class 11 students on 22/03/2022 Tuesday in SBPPS auditorium. Judges present for this Elocution Competition was Dr Hanmant Nayane. Assi. Prof. Of English at PCCOE, Mr. Manoj Wakhare. Lecturer of English at PCP.
